014e3c1fa86ae01a25eb56ff64e8679a5f9c7af1.did: We conducted an investigation into user interfaces that prioritize human interaction through intuitive design and accessibility.
014e3c1fa86ae01a25eb56ff64e8679a5f9c7af1.found: We found that user-friendly interfaces significantly enhance user satisfaction and operational efficiency in technology environments.
014e3c1fa86ae01a25eb56ff64e8679a5f9c7af1.takeaway: Our findings contribute to the development of interface design principles that can improve user engagement and accessibility in the Information and Communication Technology market.

01824fd1d42c21fa6c321d3849e3a50e85ba0049.did: We built Therminator, a thermal display concept that provides localized thermal feedback using flowing liquids through a network of tubes in Virtual Reality.
01824fd1d42c21fa6c321d3849e3a50e85ba0049.found: We found that varying thermal stimuli significantly impact perceived temperature and comfort, while also demonstrating that visual and thermal stimuli interact to affect user involvement.
01824fd1d42c21fa6c321d3849e3a50e85ba0049.takeaway: Our research suggests that integrating congruent thermal and visual feedback in Virtual Reality can enhance immersion and user experience in diverse applications, such as training and entertainment.

0347a8e0082b1306558268dfa093ba15def4849c.did: We designed an experimental setup to investigate the manipulation of stiffness perception of compliant objects in Virtual Reality by altering the Control-to-Display ratio of participants' index finger and thumb movements during pinching.
0347a8e0082b1306558268dfa093ba15def4849c.found: We found that our approach effectively modifies perceived stiffness, allowing for bridging gaps of up to 50% in physical stiffness without negatively affecting the visuo-haptic experience.
0347a8e0082b1306558268dfa093ba15def4849c.takeaway: Our findings provide critical insights into enhancing haptic feedback systems for Virtual Reality, indicating opportunities for creating more versatile and adaptable haptic experiences.

07b441d25416c186813e8d942fbfca5eb0fe2c54.did: We conducted a comparative analysis of the Nine Hole Peg Test and a Copy Drawing Test to assess Fine Motor Control using digital surfaces.
07b441d25416c186813e8d942fbfca5eb0fe2c54.found: We found that metrics from digital drawing tasks, such as pressure and speed, effectively predict completion times of the Nine Hole Peg Test, thereby allowing assessment of Fine Motor Control through standard mobile devices.
07b441d25416c186813e8d942fbfca5eb0fe2c54.takeaway: Our approach enables more accessible and personalized assessments of Fine Motor Control in Human-Computer Interaction, potentially leading to adaptive interfaces that accommodate individual user capabilities.

08792342015f2e7b02570365f53b49c0b889f531.did: We built Let’s Frets, a modular guitar support system that integrates capacitive sensing and visual guidance through an augmented fretboard and a mobile application.
08792342015f2e7b02570365f53b49c0b889f531.found: We found that Let’s Frets effectively supports both beginners and advanced guitarists in practicing chords, scales, and melodies, while also facilitating remote collaboration and feedback.
08792342015f2e7b02570365f53b49c0b889f531.takeaway: Our work contributes to the field of Human-Computer Interaction by providing a novel approach to guitar learning that enhances user engagement and skill development without altering the traditional form of the instrument.

0afead8711d5030e78acd2e8e8074c4c5b782c61.did: We conducted a controlled experiment to assess various visualization and interaction techniques for comparison tasks in Virtual Reality environments.
0afead8711d5030e78acd2e8e8074c4c5b782c61.found: We found that button interactions significantly outperformed gesture interactions in usability, with specific visualization techniques providing distinct advantages for maintaining an overview or identifying details.
0afead8711d5030e78acd2e8e8074c4c5b782c61.takeaway: Our study contributes actionable insights for designing more effective Virtual Reality applications that enhance user experience by optimizing interaction modalities and visualization methods.

0f052e9b3e1f629afd3bc8eb393aed4a2b0fcf17.did: We conducted a study to explore the influence of different undo techniques for object manipulation in multi-user Virtual Reality in various collaboration modes.
0f052e9b3e1f629afd3bc8eb393aed4a2b0fcf17.found: We found that users desire and effectively utilize undo functionalities in Virtual Reality, with the type of undo technique significantly impacting users' performance and social connectedness.
0f052e9b3e1f629afd3bc8eb393aed4a2b0fcf17.takeaway: Our findings suggest that integrating well-designed undo mechanics into multi-user Virtual Reality applications can enhance user experience by allowing easier recovery from mistakes and fostering social connections among users.

11767d55e38d859e5cbf5fe8690149dcf1069f96.did: We conducted an experiment assessing how visualizations affect the haptic perception of roughness in Virtual Reality, using a prototype designed for arm stroking.
11767d55e38d859e5cbf5fe8690149dcf1069f96.found: We found that two levels of physical roughness are sufficient to convey a realistic illusion of matching textures across different visualizations in Virtual Reality.
11767d55e38d859e5cbf5fe8690149dcf1069f96.takeaway: Our results imply that future haptic systems can be simplified by using only two roughness textures, thereby enhancing device compactness while maintaining immersive experiences.

12a0e9340b5eeb16d849d931c4c40e8a3ab6aff7.did: We built UndoPort, an extension of the point-and-teleport locomotion technique that incorporates undo actions for reverting position and orientation changes in Virtual Reality.
12a0e9340b5eeb16d849d931c4c40e8a3ab6aff7.found: We found that the combination of position and orientation undo along with discrete visualization resulted in the highest efficiency without increasing orientation errors in our controlled experiment.
12a0e9340b5eeb16d849d931c4c40e8a3ab6aff7.takeaway: Our results suggest that implementing undo actions in Virtual Reality can significantly enhance user efficiency while navigating, though attention should be given to potential disorientation issues.

1655def6b0f83f50a5621e5e79e9b6d95dc3aa61.did: We conducted a user study to investigate the effects of visual shape and size illusions on user performance, experience, and behavior during collaborative object handover tasks in Virtual Reality.
1655def6b0f83f50a5621e5e79e9b6d95dc3aa61.found: We found that visuo-haptic mismatches negatively impacted both performance and experience, and users adapted to these discrepancies by shifting reliance from visual to haptic cues, but could not fully mitigate the effects of visual inconsistencies.
1655def6b0f83f50a5621e5e79e9b6d95dc3aa61.takeaway: Our findings provide guidelines for the careful integration of haptic illusions into collaborative Extended Reality systems, emphasizing the importance of managing visual discrepancies and supporting user adaptation strategies.

17699f7504cda881de84384bc8ba8ad838bd483c.did: We designed and implemented a novel Encountered-type Haptic Display that incorporates thermal feedback to enhance user experiences in Virtual Reality.
17699f7504cda881de84384bc8ba8ad838bd483c.found: We found that the addition of thermal feedback significantly improves user immersion and haptic realism during virtual interactions compared to traditional haptic methods without temperature feedback.
17699f7504cda881de84384bc8ba8ad838bd483c.takeaway: Our results suggest that integrating thermal feedback into haptic displays can substantially enrich Virtual Reality experiences, making them more dynamic and realistic.

17a1dcb7cf001d8559a2b8d7b2d9744cd21b7743.did: We conducted a user study to investigate the effects of shared gaze on collaboration in collocated Augmented Reality by varying gaze visibility, task types, and interaction spaces across three collaborative tasks.
17a1dcb7cf001d8559a2b8d7b2d9744cd21b7743.found: We found that shared gaze enhances mutual anticipation and shared attention during collaboration without significantly impacting task completion time or perceived workload.
17a1dcb7cf001d8559a2b8d7b2d9744cd21b7743.takeaway: Our results suggest that while shared gaze can improve the quality of coordination in collocated settings, it should be used as an on-demand aid rather than an accelerator for efficiency.

18e0b02ca9518ec1b72233484e667d3ee522421a.did: We built a palm-based interface for a novel notification system called Slappyfications that enables users to send three types of unmissable notifications: poke, slap, and the STEAM-HAMMER.
18e0b02ca9518ec1b72233484e667d3ee522421a.found: We found that none of the participants missed a single Slappyfication during our Wizard-of-Oz study, demonstrating its effectiveness in real-world scenarios.
18e0b02ca9518ec1b72233484e667d3ee522421a.takeaway: Our work contributes to the design of more noticeable notification systems, highlighting the potential for physical interactions to enhance user awareness and engagement.

1949730d43846d0e01738db6aab88f8c485dbbd9.did: We built CameraReady, a mobile and cross-platform posture guidance system that evaluates the influence of different display types and visualizations on user performance.
1949730d43846d0e01738db6aab88f8c485dbbd9.found: We found that larger displays resulted in 12% lower error rates and that participants rated 3D body models as significantly more usable compared to skeleton visualizations.
1949730d43846d0e01738db6aab88f8c485dbbd9.takeaway: Our study highlights the importance of display size and visualization type in enhancing the effectiveness of posture guidance applications, suggesting that larger screens and detailed visualizations can significantly improve user outcomes.

22820f21b39a5721dd6327f7349ed2636c8aee43.did: We introduced and evaluated three point & teleport locomotion techniques for Virtual Reality that allow users to specify the target orientation in addition to the target position.
22820f21b39a5721dd6327f7349ed2636c8aee43.found: We found that while the techniques with orientation indication increased the average teleportation time, they significantly reduced the need for correcting the user’s orientation after teleportation.
22820f21b39a5721dd6327f7349ed2636c8aee43.takeaway: We recommend that designers of Virtual Reality environments implement a teleportation method with orientation indication to enable more accurate navigation, despite the potential increase in time required for each teleport.

22ca686214b51b27e0d25be0b98f791c8632eae9.did: We conducted two controlled experiments to explore foot-tapping as an input modality for interacting with Head-Mounted Displays.
22ca686214b51b27e0d25be0b98f791c8632eae9.found: We found that direct foot-tapping interactions yielded higher accuracy and faster task completion times compared to indirect interactions, but participants expressed a preference for indirect interfaces.
22ca686214b51b27e0d25be0b98f791c8632eae9.takeaway: Our findings provide design guidelines for implementing foot-based interaction interfaces in Head-Mounted Displays, suggesting direct interfaces for precision tasks and indirect interfaces for more general use.

248604f05affaaf9ca8c8ebc16fa67efab267dae.did: We built ThermoFeet, a system that provides thermal feedback on the feet to convey directional cues using four thermal actuators.
248604f05affaaf9ca8c8ebc16fa67efab267dae.found: We found that users could more accurately detect cool thermal signals compared to warm ones, and that stimuli directly associated with the spatial distribution of actuators resulted in better recognition than phantom sensations.
248604f05affaaf9ca8c8ebc16fa67efab267dae.takeaway: Our work suggests that thermal feedback on the feet can enhance navigational experiences, with practical implications for applications in mobile interaction and immersive environments.

250dd9fe1c5a5d2d690d446b4d2559a7076d33eb.did: We conducted a user study to explore the potential of Large Language Models in co-creating internet memes with human participants.
250dd9fe1c5a5d2d690d446b4d2559a7076d33eb.found: We found that while LLM assistance resulted in a higher quantity of generated meme ideas and reduced perceived effort, it did not enhance the overall quality of the memes compared to those created solely by humans.
250dd9fe1c5a5d2d690d446b4d2559a7076d33eb.takeaway: Our research highlights the importance of human creativity in achieving deeper connections in humor, suggesting that while AI can boost idea generation, it is crucial for collaborative frameworks to integrate human input effectively.

2571f815243f225c6fb27de6cf91cf647a7dae56.did: We designed a novel technique for altering the perceived stiffness of objects in Virtual Reality by manipulating the Control-to-Display ratio while users press down on a fixed stiffness object.
2571f815243f225c6fb27de6cf91cf647a7dae56.found: We found that our technique allows objects to be perceived as up to 28.1% softer and 8.9% stiffer without users detecting the manipulation of their hand movements.
2571f815243f225c6fb27de6cf91cf647a7dae56.takeaway: This approach has significant implications for enhancing haptic feedback in Virtual Reality applications, providing a cost-effective option for improving user immersion and interaction with virtual environments.

2879a011f743548251b1498d8f42504f54693ab8.did: We built PalmRC, an eyes-free, palm-surface-based television remote control that allows users to interact with their non-dominant hand while focusing on the television screen.
2879a011f743548251b1498d8f42504f54693ab8.found: We found that participants could effectively touch nine distinct landmarks on their palm without visual attention, allowing for precise interactions with television interfaces.
2879a011f743548251b1498d8f42504f54693ab8.takeaway: Our work demonstrates that leveraging the palm as an input surface can enhance user experience by providing a device-less and intuitive method for interacting with television systems.

2bf2633dbcf17a8e6b342c9acd6f98ea1f01c84f.did: We designed six new 3D teleportation methods in virtual environments by combining linear and parabolic aiming with different transitioning types.
2bf2633dbcf17a8e6b342c9acd6f98ea1f01c84f.found: We found that the linear aiming method significantly enhances target selection speed and accuracy, with the optimal combination being linear aiming paired with instant transitioning.
2bf2633dbcf17a8e6b342c9acd6f98ea1f01c84f.takeaway: Our research provides valuable insights for improving locomotion techniques in Virtual Reality, suggesting that prioritizing linear aiming can optimize user experience without increasing Virtual Reality sickness.

2c036f0882e997f20d1b85254990571c81d5848c.did: We conducted a hands-on workshop focused on best practices and design recommendations for 3D printed electronics.
2c036f0882e997f20d1b85254990571c81d5848c.found: We found that participants encountered various challenges during the design and fabrication processes, which led to valuable discussions on problem-solving strategies.
2c036f0882e997f20d1b85254990571c81d5848c.takeaway: We demonstrate that sharing experiences in 3D printed electronics can inspire and equip new users to create engaging and functional tangible objects.

2d2cab23e108a5e342b3e8c7e377fc0f15f2a3f5.did: We conducted an in-the-wild study to explore user expectations of proactive artificial intelligence systems across various use cases and proactivity levels with 272 participants using our mobile application ProfileMe.
2d2cab23e108a5e342b3e8c7e377fc0f15f2a3f5.found: We found that while users showed a significant openness towards proactive support in most areas, they preferred reactive or no support in mental health contexts, largely due to privacy concerns and trust issues regarding AI systems.
2d2cab23e108a5e342b3e8c7e377fc0f15f2a3f5.takeaway: Our findings suggest that designers of proactive AI systems should adapt their systems to match user expectations, ensuring clear communication and user control to foster acceptance and utilization.

2fbe67c08d119e237a1766bfcc6d10a43047fa10.did: We designed ShadAR, an Augmented Reality application that enables real-time transformation of visual perception through shader generation using large language models.
2fbe67c08d119e237a1766bfcc6d10a43047fa10.found: We demonstrate that ShadAR allows users to express their visual intent in natural language, which is then translated into shader code for immediate application in Augmented Reality experiences.
2fbe67c08d119e237a1766bfcc6d10a43047fa10.takeaway: Our application highlights the potential of using large language models for enhancing accessibility and creativity in visual experiences.

314c3a2d4c01583720090553c4c657645c01a74e.did: We conducted a high-fidelity Wizard of Oz study with 22 novice participants to explore how they approach voice-based 3D modeling.
314c3a2d4c01583720090553c4c657645c01a74e.found: We found that novices rely on simple commands, often involving corrections and vague instructions, which highlights gaps in their understanding and expectations from voice assistants.
314c3a2d4c01583720090553c4c657645c01a74e.takeaway: Our work provides design implications for future voice-based 3D modeling tools, aiming to lower barriers for novice users and facilitate a more intuitive design and customization process.

33fbac99824f328a4fadf7bfbf82fdef498ed9cf.did: We conducted a user study to analyze the perceived comfort and performance of rotational and translational mid-air interactions in Extended Reality.
33fbac99824f328a4fadf7bfbf82fdef498ed9cf.found: We found that translational interactions are generally more comfortable and efficient, while rotational interactions can be viable in specific spatial or fine-granular contexts.
33fbac99824f328a4fadf7bfbf82fdef498ed9cf.takeaway: Our findings provide practical guidance for designing more ergonomic mid-air interactions, enhancing the comfort and sustainability of Augmented Human experiences.

3c689451c018f4c6675818befad479f881787085.did: We conducted a controlled experiment to investigate the effects of imitation timing (parallel vs. sequential) and limb visualizations (hand vs. full arm) on user performance and experience in first-person Augmented Reality instructions.
3c689451c018f4c6675818befad479f881787085.found: We found that parallel imitation resulted in faster performance and greater embodiment, while sequential imitation improved memory retention and comfort, with hands-only visualizations enhancing order recall.
3c689451c018f4c6675818befad479f881787085.takeaway: Our findings inform the design of Augmented Reality instruction systems, suggesting that timing and limb representation should be carefully considered to balance speed, retention, and user experience.

3d9c72ff4d0a53c750ccb787a3bb5662706557e1.did: We conducted an exploratory study to investigate the effectiveness of Virtual Reality as a fear-reduction training tool for climbers, involving 20 participants who performed multiple falls from a height of 5 meters with and without a VR headset.
3d9c72ff4d0a53c750ccb787a3bb5662706557e1.found: We found that while Virtual Reality shows promise for reducing fear responses during climbing falls, the scaling of fall height did not significantly enhance the perceived exposure due to participant feedback about the lack of reference in the virtual environment.
3d9c72ff4d0a53c750ccb787a3bb5662706557e1.takeaway: Our research suggests that integrating Virtual Reality into climbing training could offer new methods for managing fear of falling, though further longitudinal studies are needed to assess its long-term impact.

405e2d7fdf2f080c00717827d888f4c42e9d5d9e.did: We developed a manufacturing method for a sensor using three-dimensional printing techniques.
405e2d7fdf2f080c00717827d888f4c42e9d5d9e.found: We demonstrated that our method effectively integrates conductive and non-conductive materials to create functional sensor architectures.
405e2d7fdf2f080c00717827d888f4c42e9d5d9e.takeaway: Our approach offers a novel technique for producing customized sensors that could enhance the design flexibility in various engineering applications.

4809f8b58842e9e0f40ecb1a9a3ce935c604fd3f.did: We conducted a user study to explore the impact of asynchronous first- and third-person perspectives and gaze visualizations on the efficiency, embodiment, and social connectedness during manual tasks in Extended Reality.
4809f8b58842e9e0f40ecb1a9a3ce935c604fd3f.found: We found that the first-person perspective significantly improves efficiency, while incorporating gaze cues did not enhance performance but increased mental load.
4809f8b58842e9e0f40ecb1a9a3ce935c604fd3f.takeaway: Our findings highlight the importance of using a first-person perspective for effective manual task instruction in Extended Reality, suggesting future systems should prioritize user preferences and effective gaze visualizations.

482bee9f2e90a6abfc8b140ca27d3588e2d9e7ad.did: We conducted a workshop focused on how to design interactions with smart objects to enhance user experience.
482bee9f2e90a6abfc8b140ca27d3588e2d9e7ad.found: We found that interdisciplinary discussions among researchers and industry professionals can lead to innovative concepts for improving interaction with smart technology.
482bee9f2e90a6abfc8b140ca27d3588e2d9e7ad.takeaway: Our work emphasizes the necessity of collaborative efforts in Human-Computer Interaction research to harness the full potential of smart objects in everyday contexts.

4a3b96e0f6a470a95fe05716ce228d26172f7533.did: We designed and tested a telepresence station that enables visitors in different museums to engage in Charades-like interactive exhibits using voiceless and touchless communication methods.
4a3b96e0f6a470a95fe05716ce228d26172f7533.found: We found that interactions using pantomime significantly enhanced efficiency and social connectedness among participants compared to drawing, highlighting the impact of interaction type on collaborative experiences.
4a3b96e0f6a470a95fe05716ce228d26172f7533.takeaway: Our work demonstrates the potential of integrating telepresence technology in museums to foster social engagement and collaborative learning, encouraging visitors to interact in a unique museum experience.

4b160eb72c286563fd5f901058a5037a0d2f8f37.did: We built PneumAct, a pneumatic jacket that enables kinesthetic movements of body joints in Virtual Reality environments by using two types of actuators: Contraction Actuators to flex joints and Extension Actuators to extend them.
4b160eb72c286563fd5f901058a5037a0d2f8f37.found: We found that different inflation durations and patterns significantly affect the angle of arm movements, with continuous inflation resulting in more fluid motions while interval patterns are better for precise targeting.
4b160eb72c286563fd5f901058a5037a0d2f8f37.takeaway: Our PneumAct system enhances immersion and realism in Virtual Reality applications, making it a valuable addition to traditional haptic feedback methods like vibrotactile systems.

4ba71e3ebcbfb5bb24e886f4da1dc9baab87ceda.did: We conducted a systematic evaluation of lateral thumb-index pinching as an input modality through a controlled experiment comparing various grip spans, counterforces, and directions in a visual targeting task.
4ba71e3ebcbfb5bb24e886f4da1dc9baab87ceda.found: We found that larger grip spans, the presence of counterforce, and left-to-right grip direction significantly enhance accuracy, efficiency, and user experience when using pinching as an input method.
4ba71e3ebcbfb5bb24e886f4da1dc9baab87ceda.takeaway: Our research contributes valuable insights for designing future pinchable user interfaces, highlighting the potential for effective use in applications like Mixed Reality and deformable displays.

4f420016573ebb2283d7e5370173e218f3688a10.did: We built PneumoVolley, a Virtual Reality experience that utilizes pneumatic actuation to provide pressure-based haptic feedback on the head during gameplay.
4f420016573ebb2283d7e5370173e218f3688a10.found: We found that participants experienced significantly higher involvement and enjoyment when using our pressure-based haptic feedback compared to a no-haptics baseline.
4f420016573ebb2283d7e5370173e218f3688a10.takeaway: Our findings suggest that pressure-based haptic feedback can enhance the immersive experience in Virtual Reality applications and warrant further exploration in various interactive contexts.

58620307a2f27909d929ad099b1f6664f10060bb.did: We conducted the Rethinking Smart Objects workshop, focusing on the interaction paradigms and societal implications of smart objects in interactive spaces.
58620307a2f27909d929ad099b1f6664f10060bb.found: We found that while significant technical challenges in implementing smart objects have been overcome, there remains a need for further research on user interaction techniques and ethical considerations.
58620307a2f27909d929ad099b1f6664f10060bb.takeaway: We aim to foster a collaborative environment that encourages researchers and practitioners to explore novel design methods for smart objects, ultimately leading to more user-friendly and intuitive interactions.

588745d91a8551567b2248931fc2e1c204cc88aa.did: We designed and implemented CaMea, a graphical user interface that utilizes a camera to support users in measuring workpieces inside a computer numerically controlled milling machine.
588745d91a8551567b2248931fc2e1c204cc88aa.found: We found that users completed tasks in CaMea significantly faster and with fewer errors compared to traditional numerical interfaces, demonstrating its effectiveness for both novice and expert users.
588745d91a8551567b2248931fc2e1c204cc88aa.takeaway: Our research contributes to the improvement of user experience in CNC machining, emphasizing the need for more intuitive interfaces to enhance usability for non-expert users in fabrication environments.

5cac48bb18e3ec51314d7ae49b41e843c95e5738.did: We investigated the effects of different Augmented Reality content anchoring strategies (hand, head, torso) on user performance in a dual-task scenario involving walking and a visual working memory task.
5cac48bb18e3ec51314d7ae49b41e843c95e5738.found: We found that head-anchored Augmented Reality content led to the least walking errors and the best performance on virtual tasks, while hand-anchored content slowed users down but increased accuracy in complex scenarios.
5cac48bb18e3ec51314d7ae49b41e843c95e5738.takeaway: Our findings suggest that content placement in Augmented Reality applications should prioritize head anchoring for enhanced user performance and reduced cognitive load, particularly in dynamic walking environments.

5ccd46bad89eb68cdb42e5c529763988b20fb1fc.did: We conducted two systematic experiments to investigate the spacing of vibrotactile actuators across different body parts to determine minimum and maximum effective distances for vibrotactile displays.
5ccd46bad89eb68cdb42e5c529763988b20fb1fc.found: We found that vibrotactile perception varies significantly across body locations, with the wrists demonstrating higher sensitivity and lower localization errors compared to other areas, indicating that actuator spacing should take into account body part sensitivity.
5ccd46bad89eb68cdb42e5c529763988b20fb1fc.takeaway: Our work contributes to the design of body-worn vibrotactile interfaces by introducing VibroMap, a spatial map that provides guidelines for the optimal spacing of actuators, enhancing the effectiveness of haptic feedback applications.

61e25a104f40d8256df05d444fa4f41429047811.did: We built VRtangibles, a system that combines tangible objects and touch input to assist children in creating virtual scenes without needing programming knowledge.
61e25a104f40d8256df05d444fa4f41429047811.found: We found that children were successful in creating virtual scenes using VRtangibles, and they reported finding the interaction engaging and enjoyable.
61e25a104f40d8256df05d444fa4f41429047811.takeaway: Our work contributes to lowering the barrier for primary school children to actively participate in virtual reality creation, emphasizing creative expression over technical skills.

64f6d5ca84b1845fe09f98829067e32723f1e306.did: We built the Oh, Snap! fabrication pipeline, which magnetically connects 3D-printed objects equipped with passive sensing structures to conventional electronics.
64f6d5ca84b1845fe09f98829067e32723f1e306.found: We found that our approach reliably establishes a usable electrical connection for capacitive sensing, is independent of user and multiple attachment cycles, and is perceived as easy and robust by users.
64f6d5ca84b1845fe09f98829067e32723f1e306.takeaway: We contribute a practical solution for creating interactive 3D-printed objects without the need for time-consuming assembly, thus enhancing rapid prototyping capabilities in Human-Computer Interaction.

674395ebf06f8cf3ed78b6739b669a12ed5af1c2.did: We conducted a workshop focused on how to design interactions with smart objects to enhance user experience.
674395ebf06f8cf3ed78b6739b669a12ed5af1c2.found: We found that interdisciplinary discussions among researchers and industry professionals can lead to innovative concepts for improving interaction with smart technology.
674395ebf06f8cf3ed78b6739b669a12ed5af1c2.takeaway: Our work emphasizes the necessity of collaborative efforts in Human-Computer Interaction research to harness the full potential of smart objects in everyday contexts.

69a8f62670ec73a6d1a4d821844b97de025120ee.did: We built a database of handwriting and drawing samples from 17 participants to investigate perceived exertion using machine learning techniques.
69a8f62670ec73a6d1a4d821844b97de025120ee.found: We found that perceived exertion can be predicted using simple line drawings, particularly demonstrating strong results with tasks involving pentagon drawings.
69a8f62670ec73a6d1a4d821844b97de025120ee.takeaway: Our research suggests that handwriting and drawing could serve as effective non-invasive methods for detecting and intervening in user exertion levels in interactive systems.

6c46d8c84012206636cdf40c29d7f4456c1733e0.did: We conducted an online survey with 110 participants to investigate how spatial contexts, dimensionality, and dynamics affect user engagement with location-based Augmented Reality content in social media.
6c46d8c84012206636cdf40c29d7f4456c1733e0.found: We found that dynamic 2D Augmented Reality content is significantly more favored for sharing and consuming in private spaces compared to public or semi-public environments.
6c46d8c84012206636cdf40c29d7f4456c1733e0.takeaway: Our study highlights the importance of context in designing future location-based Augmented Reality social media platforms, suggesting a focus on dynamic 2D content embedded in private spaces to enhance user comfort and engagement.

6cc94fb711f0c8deccdb5f72f82bfe391c98ed33.did: We hosted the Mensch und Computer 2022 conference at the Technische Universität Darmstadt, gathering nearly 600 participants from academia and industry.
6cc94fb711f0c8deccdb5f72f82bfe391c98ed33.found: We found that the conference theme 'Facing Realities' resonated strongly with attendees, highlighting the importance of real-world applications in Human-Computer Interaction.
6cc94fb711f0c8deccdb5f72f82bfe391c98ed33.takeaway: We contribute to the ongoing dialogue in Human-Computer Interaction by emphasizing the value of in-person interactions and practical engagement within the field.

73350e2efb62c601945cfdf2a6b59ec342349f67.did: We designed and evaluated three different visualizations to represent physical passersby in a Virtual Environment using Augmented Virtuality.
73350e2efb62c601945cfdf2a6b59ec342349f67.found: We found that while the 2D-Image and Avatar representations allowed for the fastest spotting of passersby, the Avatar and 3D-Scan visualizations provided the most accurate location information.
73350e2efb62c601945cfdf2a6b59ec342349f67.takeaway: Our research indicates that to minimize distractions and enhance user safety in Virtual Reality, it is beneficial to employ representations like the Avatar, which balances detail and immersion.

75d577e90f20da08db4de0f50fb7e7e8a1a1893f.did: We built Trilaterate, a fabrication pipeline that enables users to 3D print custom objects capable of detecting hover, touch, and force interactions through embedded capacitive sensors.
75d577e90f20da08db4de0f50fb7e7e8a1a1893f.found: We found that Trilaterate successfully allows for the estimation of a finger's 3D position using capacitive trilateration, significantly improving interaction accuracy and reducing assembly effort.
75d577e90f20da08db4de0f50fb7e7e8a1a1893f.takeaway: Our work demonstrates that integrating capacitive sensing into 3D printed objects can enhance user interaction possibilities in various applications, paving the way for more expressive and multifunctional designs.

76c963f98c06ff090531dbda6d15142c754f4fc6.did: We designed two interaction concepts that leverage the user's palm as a 2D interactive surface for head-mounted displays.
76c963f98c06ff090531dbda6d15142c754f4fc6.found: We found that palm-based interactions can significantly enhance user experience and usability when interfacing with augmented reality and head-up display systems.
76c963f98c06ff090531dbda6d15142c754f4fc6.takeaway: Our work contributes to advancing interaction modalities for head-mounted displays, suggesting that palm-based interfaces can provide more intuitive and enjoyable user experiences.

782d018192764de75b020b9430e3dfb343a3524e.did: We built ProxiWatch, a one-handed proximity-based input modality for smartwatches that utilizes the elbow joint's degree of freedom for interaction.
782d018192764de75b020b9430e3dfb343a3524e.found: We found that users have distinct personal interaction spaces, and thus a general model for proximity-based interaction across users is not feasible.
782d018192764de75b020b9430e3dfb343a3524e.takeaway: Our research provides guidelines for designing proximity-based smartwatch interfaces, emphasizing the customization of interaction spaces to enhance user experience.

792203592e0b42bbff3ed27d83e93231b04c8584.did: We conducted workshops at the 11th Engineering Interactive Computing Systems conference to discuss research and trends in the engineering of interactive systems.
792203592e0b42bbff3ed27d83e93231b04c8584.found: We found that the workshops highlighted significant challenges in developing interactive systems, particularly regarding novel forms of interaction and the integration of multiple stakeholder viewpoints.
792203592e0b42bbff3ed27d83e93231b04c8584.takeaway: Our findings emphasize the need for new methods and tools to address the complexities of designing and engineering interactive systems in diverse application domains.

7a22f7f83dc82228b5717a5ca64cf0635653a1eb.did: We explored how AR memes influence face-to-face conversations through a survey of meme users and a multi-user prototype study in which pairs of friends designed and used their own AR meme visualizations.
7a22f7f83dc82228b5717a5ca64cf0635653a1eb.found: We found that participants utilized three archetypes for visualizing memes in Augmented Reality: 'Me in the Meme', 'The Meme on Me', and 'Meme as Visual Reference', along with distinct integration patterns of sequential and parallel usage.
7a22f7f83dc82228b5717a5ca64cf0635653a1eb.takeaway: Our research highlights the potential of integrating Augmented Reality memes into social interactions, offering a novel form of communication that enhances humor and engagement in face-to-face conversations.

7fdb08c49b7d96a259aee156d6c0bccf2af8fa0f.did: We conducted a workshop that focused on advanced interactions with Smart Connected and Wearable Things in the context of the Internet of Things.
7fdb08c49b7d96a259aee156d6c0bccf2af8fa0f.found: We found that integrating perspectives from various disciplines, including Human-Computer Interaction and Artificial Intelligence, enhances the interaction design of smart objects and wearables.
7fdb08c49b7d96a259aee156d6c0bccf2af8fa0f.takeaway: Our work highlights the necessity for cross-disciplinary collaboration to develop intuitive and context-aware interaction methods that improve user experience with smart technologies.

838258ebdd9af287e768a9fcf16369b0470a0675.did: We conducted a user study to investigate how the speed-accuracy trade-off and user involvement affect frustration during human-robot collaboration in an assembly task.
838258ebdd9af287e768a9fcf16369b0470a0675.found: We found that user frustration was highest when robots exhibited risky behavior and that involving users in decision-making decreased frustration only in high-risk scenarios, while increasing it in conservative situations.
838258ebdd9af287e768a9fcf16369b0470a0675.takeaway: Our findings suggest that robots should defer to users in high-risk situations to mitigate frustration but operate autonomously in low-risk scenarios to enhance efficiency.

87d509d685287f47a898630de8c7f2e1ed17e706.did: We designed a palm-based interface for eyes-free television control that allows users to interact without the need for a traditional remote control.
87d509d685287f47a898630de8c7f2e1ed17e706.found: We found that users can effectively and accurately touch specific landmarks on their palm to control television functions without visual attention, achieving an effectiveness of over 94% for palm landmarks.
87d509d685287f47a898630de8c7f2e1ed17e706.takeaway: Our work suggests that leveraging the palm as an interactive surface could significantly enhance user experience by enabling device-less and attention-free interactions with television systems.

885c02b4d0364b8796d319f973bf192970eb0f30.did: We built CheckMate, a tangible Augmented Reality interface that integrates 3D printed objects and touch-enabled surfaces for remote interaction.
885c02b4d0364b8796d319f973bf192970eb0f30.found: We found that our system significantly enhances the user experience by providing tangible interactions that closely mimic co-located communication, as evidenced by positive feedback from participants in our exploratory study.
885c02b4d0364b8796d319f973bf192970eb0f30.takeaway: Our work demonstrates that combining tangible user interfaces with Augmented Reality can improve remote collaboration experiences, potentially applicable beyond gaming to various interactive scenarios.

88a491a16680b4e01525c0865072bc3e13a16ea3.did: We built Let’s Frets, a modular guitar learning system that incorporates visual indicators and capacitive sensing to assist guitar students during practice.
88a491a16680b4e01525c0865072bc3e13a16ea3.found: We found that the combination of visual indicators and finger position capturing yields the highest playing accuracy, while visual indicators facilitate quicker learning of new finger positions.
88a491a16680b4e01525c0865072bc3e13a16ea3.takeaway: Let’s Frets enables independent practice sessions for guitar students, demonstrating potential applicability to other musical instruments.

8a95ac08c6c910bda9dd8b0ee8e1c059d5f67649.did: We conducted a Wizard-of-Oz study to investigate how different representation modes of an artificial intelligence influence user perception and interaction during 3D object co-creation in Virtual Reality.
8a95ac08c6c910bda9dd8b0ee8e1c059d5f67649.found: We found that an embodied AI significantly enhances user perception of its contributions, while highlighting areas for AI modification reduces user satisfaction and perceived partnership with the AI.
8a95ac08c6c910bda9dd8b0ee8e1c059d5f67649.takeaway: We recommend using an embodied AI for co-creation tasks to foster better collaboration, yet caution against using highlighting to avoid diminishing user enjoyment and ownership of created objects.

9053a8b623f7703bad7f2bd4db2402971c99a91a.did: We designed two Augmented Reality visualizations, X-ray and Countdown, to assist cyclists in making crossing decisions at uncontrolled intersections.
9053a8b623f7703bad7f2bd4db2402971c99a91a.found: We found that the X-ray visualization ensured faster selection of shorter gaps between cars, whereas the Countdown enhanced the feeling of safety and provided better situational awareness.
9053a8b623f7703bad7f2bd4db2402971c99a91a.takeaway: Our research demonstrates that Augmented Reality can effectively assist cyclists in navigating dangerous intersections, potentially leading to improved safety and decision-making.

92c18933c04880b57e6470c95660806ab1fcd548.did: We built CloudBits, an augmented reality system for head-mounted displays that visualizes and retrieves information proactively during conversations.
92c18933c04880b57e6470c95660806ab1fcd548.found: We found that CloudBits enhances mutual awareness and re-engagement in conversations by providing shared, spatially organized, and contextually relevant information bits.
92c18933c04880b57e6470c95660806ab1fcd548.takeaway: Our work contributes guidelines for designing conversation support systems that leverage spatial interaction and allow for selective sharing of private and public information.

992a3963b53e6b75b0b42f8641d9b8571922e775.did: We designed interaction techniques that leverage limb movements for augmented reality applications using head-mounted displays.
992a3963b53e6b75b0b42f8641d9b8571922e775.found: We found that our proposed interaction methods enable more natural and efficient user experiences by utilizing the degrees of freedom provided by the upper and lower limbs during interaction.
992a3963b53e6b75b0b42f8641d9b8571922e775.takeaway: This work contributes to the field of Human-Computer Interaction by providing novel input modalities that facilitate mobile, hands-free interactions in digitally augmented environments.

992b6ab80b2c7f102a394105cd83166b2fa2404b.did: We conducted a contextual investigation of social cues used by non-anthropomorphic robots in a hospital setting, testing 103 cues from literature through a large online survey.
992b6ab80b2c7f102a394105cd83166b2fa2404b.found: We found that human interpretations of social cues vary significantly by context, indicating that perception of robotic communication is not uniform across different situations.
992b6ab80b2c7f102a394105cd83166b2fa2404b.takeaway: We highlight the necessity for designing dynamic and adaptive social cues in interactive robotic systems to enhance their effective communication.

9b184104efe55c85519f508533248dbc8b43a255.did: We designed a location-aware Virtual Reality system that incorporates real-world cues during mobile interactions in vehicles, using two visualizations based on points of interest.
9b184104efe55c85519f508533248dbc8b43a255.found: We found that while continuous live street views lead to decreased presence in Virtual Reality, incorporating location-based cues when passing specific points significantly preserves user experience while improving situational awareness.
9b184104efe55c85519f508533248dbc8b43a255.takeaway: Our work contributes practical strategies for enhancing user situational awareness in mobile Virtual Reality environments, suggesting that a balance between immersion and reality awareness can be achieved by dynamically presenting real-world information.

9b1d09bb23d1762a94eba56938c359fa19cf42a6.did: We conducted two user studies to investigate the effects of stationary and moving direct skin vibrotactile stimulation on the palm.
9b1d09bb23d1762a94eba56938c359fa19cf42a6.found: We found that a nine actuator display with a 3 × 3 resolution can accurately localize stationary sensations, and a 2 × 4 resolution achieves high recognition accuracy for moving sensations.
9b1d09bb23d1762a94eba56938c359fa19cf42a6.takeaway: Our findings provide design guidelines for developing enhanced palm-based tactile displays, ensuring effective and expressive vibrotactile feedback in various applications.

9d35ad9084d3267dd0bb630dcad2c2d588469acd.did: We built a proof-of-concept prototype of a personalized user-carried single button interface for interacting with a smart coffee machine.
9d35ad9084d3267dd0bb630dcad2c2d588469acd.found: We found that users preferred the new system for its ease and speed, expressing that it eliminated annoyances present in the traditional coffee order process.
9d35ad9084d3267dd0bb630dcad2c2d588469acd.takeaway: Our work demonstrates that personalized user-carried single button interfaces can significantly enhance the user experience when interacting with smart devices, making interactions simpler and more efficient.

9ef6fedeb67e6c73b72e029a4b3cffc90a86f04d.did: We designed and evaluated two interaction modalities, flashlight and 3D cutting planes, for exploring Spatial Dense Dynamic Data in Virtual Reality.
9ef6fedeb67e6c73b72e029a4b3cffc90a86f04d.found: We found that the flashlight modality improved tracking of dynamic targets, while the cutting plane modality was more effective for highlighting static volumes of interest, particularly in high-density environments.
9ef6fedeb67e6c73b72e029a4b3cffc90a86f04d.takeaway: Our research contributes practical interaction techniques that significantly enhance user performance and reduce mental load when navigating complex and dense 3D data in Virtual Reality.

a11470a6cf3f754ee652ec7c8c0bd4a2632e8ed0.did: We built and evaluated nine novel locomotion concepts for foot-based teleportation in Virtual Reality, using the 3D position and pressure of the user's feet as input modalities.
a11470a6cf3f754ee652ec7c8c0bd4a2632e8ed0.found: We found that while foot-based teleportation methods require longer task completion times than traditional controller-based teleportation, they provide a hands-free engagement that could enhance interactions in virtual environments.
a11470a6cf3f754ee652ec7c8c0bd4a2632e8ed0.takeaway: Our work suggests that implementing foot-based locomotion can improve user experience in Virtual Reality applications by allowing simultaneous interaction tasks, though trade-offs in speed and accuracy should be assessed for specific applications.

a3b4bd3420250621c253905539a82df43bdd2a5e.did: We developed a mobile Extended Reality application that allows users to explore and interact with a mountain observatory virtually, addressing physical accessibility barriers.
a3b4bd3420250621c253905539a82df43bdd2a5e.found: We found that context-dependent physical proximity significantly influences user experience factors such as mental workload, presence, motivation, and perceived access, although quiz performance remained consistent across conditions.
a3b4bd3420250621c253905539a82df43bdd2a5e.takeaway: Our results highlight the importance of incorporating proximity-aware design in Extended Reality systems to enhance educational engagement and make inaccessible locations more meaningful for users.

a7fa783d9ed4c5a03d0f1a7a9f8f6a0309b342c1.did: We built Embracer, a wearable encountered-type haptic controller that allows for three degrees of freedom input and feedback.
a7fa783d9ed4c5a03d0f1a7a9f8f6a0309b342c1.found: We found that Embracer provides nuanced haptic sensations and allows for natural user input, significantly enhancing the immersive experience in Virtual Reality environments.
a7fa783d9ed4c5a03d0f1a7a9f8f6a0309b342c1.takeaway: Our work contributes to the development of more realistic haptic feedback systems, paving the way for improved engagement in training simulations and entertainment applications.

a850422b7b684a66d79fedcb871b5f5ebc7f06bf.did: We designed a virtual escape room game that visualizes asynchronous players' heartbeats using various types of data visualizations.
a850422b7b684a66d79fedcb871b5f5ebc7f06bf.found: We found that visualizing heartbeats significantly increases feelings of social connectedness among players, particularly when using symbolic heart icons compared to electrocardiogram visualizations.
a850422b7b684a66d79fedcb871b5f5ebc7f06bf.takeaway: Our work demonstrates that incorporating physiological data visualizations in single-player games can enrich the social experience and support connections between players who are not playing simultaneously.

aa4ad12c7362419848ef3761ee21ab9f11e53695.did: We conducted a controlled experiment to assess the feasibility of using toe movements as an input modality for computer systems, focusing on the influence of five factors on interaction performance.
aa4ad12c7362419848ef3761ee21ab9f11e53695.found: We found that toe-based interactions can achieve high accuracy and efficiency, with performance significantly affected by the scaling, toes used, and user posture, particularly favoring sitting positions and all-toe movements.
aa4ad12c7362419848ef3761ee21ab9f11e53695.takeaway: Our results provide design recommendations for future toe-based interfaces, emphasizing their potential for hands-free, efficient interaction in situations where traditional input methods are impractical.

ab0101ed88f9ae63fecc6e2b30a3f01baae52551.did: We built ActuBoard, a prototyping platform designed to minimize initial setup and facilitate the integration of hardware actuators in remote applications.
ab0101ed88f9ae63fecc6e2b30a3f01baae52551.found: We found that ActuBoard significantly reduces the effort associated with traditional prototyping by allowing users to connect off-the-shelf components without the need for complex circuitry or firmware programming.
ab0101ed88f9ae63fecc6e2b30a3f01baae52551.takeaway: Our contribution simplifies the prototyping process for both experienced and novice users, enabling a broader range of designers to focus on interaction concepts rather than hardware challenges.

ad84261aa8762410ba5cab6c29be362e540f2c9d.did: We built VRChairRacer, a novel locomotion technique that uses the backrest of an office chair to control a virtual racing cart in a multiplayer racing game.
ad84261aa8762410ba5cab6c29be362e540f2c9d.found: We found that mapping the chair's tilt to acceleration and its rotation to steering provides an immersive and realistic racing experience while minimizing cyber sickness.
ad84261aa8762410ba5cab6c29be362e540f2c9d.takeaway: Our approach offers a low-cost and effective solution for enhancing locomotion in Virtual Reality environments, making it accessible for use in multiplayer settings.

af14d4c4729ccc35af1af9ae06de20ffa8807ca9.did: We conducted the Third International Workshop on Ubiquitous Personal Assistance to discuss the latest research outcomes and interdisciplinary approaches in the development and design of digital personal assistants.
af14d4c4729ccc35af1af9ae06de20ffa8807ca9.found: We found that while advancements in ubiquitous technologies and artificial intelligence have progressed digital personal assistants, significant challenges remain in achieving unobtrusive, intent-based support akin to human personal assistants.
af14d4c4729ccc35af1af9ae06de20ffa8807ca9.takeaway: Our work highlights the need for ongoing collaboration between researchers and practitioners to address current limitations and inspire innovative solutions in the field of ubiquitous personal assistance.

af2e5fb0414bb1e15394c9c76cc6497e3f4bdcf6.did: We designed and built two interaction concepts, Bring Your Own Information and Bring Your Own Tool, utilizing 3D printed tangible objects for enhanced interaction on touch-enabled surfaces.
af2e5fb0414bb1e15394c9c76cc6497e3f4bdcf6.found: We found that our system enables seamless sharing and manipulation of digital content across various devices through customizable, low-cost tangible objects without additional hardware.
af2e5fb0414bb1e15394c9c76cc6497e3f4bdcf6.takeaway: Our approach enhances collaborative interactions in multi-device environments, addressing common limitations associated with data sharing and haptic feedback in digital content manipulation.

b5f05da9b13c49a8db0ae26e0962562dc701f960.did: We built Itsy-Bits, a fabrication pipeline for 3D printing and recognizing tangibles on capacitive touchscreens with a footprint as small as a fingertip.
b5f05da9b13c49a8db0ae26e0962562dc701f960.found: We found that Itsy-Bits can reliably identify and locate multiple 3D-printed shapes in different sizes with a shape accuracy of 95.63% and a mean rotation error of 6.53°.
b5f05da9b13c49a8db0ae26e0962562dc701f960.takeaway: Our approach enables the creation of highly individualized tangible user interfaces, enhancing interaction on the most common form factors of touchscreens.

b75865337a66336e555fd408a0434bcc00e65ce8.did: We conducted a user study comparing three order picking assistance systems: textual instructions in German, textual instructions in Finnish, and an Augmented Reality system using a Microsoft HoloLens.
b75865337a66336e555fd408a0434bcc00e65ce8.found: We found that the Augmented Reality system resulted in significantly faster task completion times and lower perceived cognitive load compared to both textual instruction conditions.
b75865337a66336e555fd408a0434bcc00e65ce8.takeaway: The use of visual guidance in Augmented Reality order picking training enhances efficiency and reduces cognitive effort, making it beneficial for production environments, especially with diverse language backgrounds.

b767adb4f3064b3002661d46c176a26b80c7951d.did: We conducted a study to investigate the efficacy of proximity-based hand input for one-handed mobile interaction using the elbow joint's flexion and extension.
b767adb4f3064b3002661d46c176a26b80c7951d.found: We found that the accuracy and efficiency of interactions in a multi-layer information space are significantly affected by the traveling distance to the target layer, while hand side and direction of interaction do not have a significant impact.
b767adb4f3064b3002661d46c176a26b80c7951d.takeaway: Our findings inform guidelines for designing on-body user interfaces, emphasizing the need to tailor layer thickness and number based on users' arm lengths to optimize interaction.

b7a8118935a9a21bf2f587b7819b7618cd3777ec.did: We designed and evaluated four types of maneuver indications for self-driving bicycles using a tandem simulator to create a realistic cycling experience without control by the rider.
b7a8118935a9a21bf2f587b7819b7618cd3777ec.found: We found that riders respond faster to visual signals, such as ambient light and head-up displays, compared to vibration and speech, while also maintaining concentration on secondary tasks like reading.
b7a8118935a9a21bf2f587b7819b7618cd3777ec.takeaway: Our results suggest that effective communication of maneuver intentions through visual signals can enhance safety and trust in self-driving bicycles, paving the way for improved designs in micro-mobility automation.

b7c5f0f741fd542afaef52cdfc5bd4d71b08c713.did: We designed and evaluated several masking techniques to obscure hand movements during PIN authentication in Virtual Reality to prevent shoulder-surfing attacks.
b7c5f0f741fd542afaef52cdfc5bd4d71b08c713.found: We found that the discrete shifting of the virtual keypad significantly improved security against shoulder-surfing without excessively impacting user performance or experience.
b7c5f0f741fd542afaef52cdfc5bd4d71b08c713.takeaway: Our findings indicate that integrating these masking techniques into future Virtual Reality authentication systems can enhance user security effectively while maintaining usability.

b943cf896afd1c52f0fbc5f9c22ed9daf8f952fc.did: We designed a method to non-invasively infer Energy Metabolism Zones and Lactate Accumulation using smartphone touchscreen input combined with built-in sensors.
b943cf896afd1c52f0fbc5f9c22ed9daf8f952fc.found: We found that our machine learning models can accurately classify physiological states related to lactate levels based on minimal interaction, with better performance observed when using participant-specific data.
b943cf896afd1c52f0fbc5f9c22ed9daf8f952fc.takeaway: Our work demonstrates the potential for smartphones to act as low-cost, non-invasive tools for athletes to monitor training intensity, suggesting significant implications for personal fitness and health management.

bb7aaf38211753fa6bc1dfeaddd420b511ad3a42.did: We conducted an outdoor experiment comparing three unimodal warnings for E-Scooter riders using Augmented Reality notifications, auditory signals, and vibrotactile feedback in a simulated environment.
bb7aaf38211753fa6bc1dfeaddd420b511ad3a42.found: We found that both Augmented Reality and auditory warnings resulted in shorter reaction times and a greater feeling of safety compared to vibrotactile warnings, with auditory warnings being the most accepted by participants.
bb7aaf38211753fa6bc1dfeaddd420b511ad3a42.takeaway: Our research highlights the potential of integrating Augmented Reality and auditory warnings into E-Scooter designs to enhance rider safety on the road.

bd4306279a776b567b47545a05d2202e72d12e96.did: We conducted a scoping review of 311 publications to explore the intersection of Extended Reality and Artificial Intelligence research published between 2017 and 2021.
bd4306279a776b567b47545a05d2202e72d12e96.found: We found five main research topics, including using Artificial Intelligence to create Extended Reality worlds and understand user interactions, highlighting a vibrant yet under-explored field.
bd4306279a776b567b47545a05d2202e72d12e96.takeaway: We emphasize the need for enhanced collaboration, ethical consideration, and methodological rigor in future research at the intersection of Extended Reality and Artificial Intelligence.

c61a7bdbed4b83c442321e1d40f7394a6506c3fb.did: We designed a conceptual framework for around-body interaction techniques using the natural skills and dexterity of our limbs.
c61a7bdbed4b83c442321e1d40f7394a6506c3fb.found: We demonstrate that integrating lower limb movements can enhance fast, accurate, and enjoyable interactions with Head-Mounted Displays.
c61a7bdbed4b83c442321e1d40f7394a6506c3fb.takeaway: Our research highlights the potential for improved user experiences in Extended Reality by leveraging the body's natural capabilities for interaction.

c67daa765353d1810f3c4b75baeabbd5915c11e5.did: We conducted a case study on the co-development of curriculum and a custom-built peer feedback system for a university course on scientific writing.
c67daa765353d1810f3c4b75baeabbd5915c11e5.found: We found that while the co-development process improved alignment between software functionality and pedagogical goals, it also revealed usability challenges and infrastructure-related frustrations.
c67daa765353d1810f3c4b75baeabbd5915c11e5.takeaway: Our research emphasizes the need for closer collaboration between educators and developers to create educational technologies that effectively support teaching and learning processes.

d34e1f09f56e305080986181b907be1ee3cd25e2.did: We designed a hands-free input modality for Head-Mounted Displays by leveraging lateral shifts of the walking path, visualizing options as lanes on the ground.
d34e1f09f56e305080986181b907be1ee3cd25e2.found: We found that participants achieved high accuracy and efficiency rates when interacting with the system, particularly in conditions with fewer lanes and optimal selection times.
d34e1f09f56e305080986181b907be1ee3cd25e2.takeaway: Our work demonstrates the potential for safe and engaging interactions with Head-Mounted Displays while users are on the move, contributing to the broader field of Human-Computer Interaction.

d49a2bc394fbb667d8969c604c51c30034d89700.did: We conducted a user study comparing headset-leaning and controller-based locomotion methods for flying in Virtual Reality, utilizing a broom metaphor for intuitive interaction.
d49a2bc394fbb667d8969c604c51c30034d89700.found: We found that using headset-leaning for steering increases the sense of presence compared to controller-pointing; however, combining headset-leaning with controller-based velocity led to poorer performance across multiple metrics.
d49a2bc394fbb667d8969c604c51c30034d89700.takeaway: Our findings suggest that while leaning enhances presence, careful consideration of the combinations of locomotion methods is crucial for optimizing user experience in flying simulations.

d65f8f70768baf147e1fe6e7aed6901a16ffd438.did: We designed and implemented three intention communication methods for multi-user locomotion in Virtual Reality, comparing them with two baseline methods in a controlled experiment.
d65f8f70768baf147e1fe6e7aed6901a16ffd438.found: We found that shared visualizations significantly enhance understanding of movement intentions among users, leading to a stronger sense of group connectedness while preserving individual freedom of movement.
d65f8f70768baf147e1fe6e7aed6901a16ffd438.takeaway: Our work contributes valuable insights for improving social interactions in Virtual Reality settings, suggesting that shared visualizations facilitate more collaborative navigation experiences.

d862d21031260146f4408802e61795fd2c4a93e1.did: We conducted a workshop focused on the interaction capabilities and functionalities of smart objects in various contexts.
d862d21031260146f4408802e61795fd2c4a93e1.found: We found that natural interaction with smart objects can be enhanced through effective communication between these objects, facilitating a more integrated ecosystem.
d862d21031260146f4408802e61795fd2c4a93e1.takeaway: We contribute to the understanding of how smart objects can interact seamlessly, which is essential for designing user-friendly and intelligent environments.

db49f035ef56622e7ec01966c6e0275fae1913ef.did: We built TrackItPipe, a fabrication pipeline that allows users to semi-automatically integrate location and rotation tracking capabilities into 3D printed objects.
db49f035ef56622e7ec01966c6e0275fae1913ef.found: We found that TrackItPipe enables both CAD experts and novices to efficiently modify 3D models by adding necessary tracking support without requiring in-depth CAD knowledge.
db49f035ef56622e7ec01966c6e0275fae1913ef.takeaway: TrackItPipe significantly simplifies the process of equipping 3D printed objects for Mixed Reality applications, fostering accessibility and rapid prototyping for users who wish to create interactive tangible designs.

dd0ee60e08702a434284788d9bb016a34bf2f1ff.did: We conducted two controlled lab experiments to evaluate steering methods and countermeasures aimed at reducing virtual reality sickness in bicycle simulators.
dd0ee60e08702a434284788d9bb016a34bf2f1ff.found: We found that using handlebar steering resulted in the lowest levels of virtual reality sickness, while airflow was identified as the most effective countermeasure across various cycling trajectories.
dd0ee60e08702a434284788d9bb016a34bf2f1ff.takeaway: Our research highlights the importance of steering design and external countermeasures, particularly airflow, in creating more enjoyable and less sickness-inducing virtual reality cycling experiences.

e61cd54f83e7234d1edf49349a3c8c8852a4e2c4.did: We designed and developed four interaction techniques that leverage both upper and lower limb movements for interacting with Head-Mounted Displays in a digitally augmented environment.
e61cd54f83e7234d1edf49349a3c8c8852a4e2c4.found: We found that these around-body interaction techniques facilitate faster, more accurate, and enjoyable interaction compared to traditional methods, while accommodating diverse user needs and situations.
e61cd54f83e7234d1edf49349a3c8c8852a4e2c4.takeaway: Our work contributes to enhancing user experience with Head-Mounted Displays by integrating natural limb movements, offering practical implications for more intuitive and accessible interactions in various contexts.

e81cea100c2f79684071a2fd18c351c2dc8436e3.did: We designed a haptic feedback system to support musicians in maintaining proper hand posture while playing musical instruments, using vibrotactile and thermal cues.
e81cea100c2f79684071a2fd18c351c2dc8436e3.found: We found that our proposed system can effectively detect incorrect posture and provide subtle feedback to guide musicians back to the correct position without distracting them from their performance.
e81cea100c2f79684071a2fd18c351c2dc8436e3.takeaway: Our research contributes to the development of ergonomic practices in music education, potentially preventing injuries and improving performance efficiency for both beginners and advanced musicians.

e9ea7ce03f2e378ce7e01368b2e02a211e574bfd.did: We designed an AI-driven system for dynamic Augmented Reality content placement that adapts to user movement and environmental changes.
e9ea7ce03f2e378ce7e01368b2e02a211e574bfd.found: We found that this system significantly reduces cognitive load by intelligently managing content distribution between external projections and head-mounted displays.
e9ea7ce03f2e378ce7e01368b2e02a211e574bfd.takeaway: Our approach can transform user experiences in various industries by providing more intuitive and context-aware interactions in dynamic environments.

eae3b3ed93eb65b01595a5054b022af4c6e67b78.did: We conducted a series of studies to investigate user preferences regarding the autonomy of Personalized Privacy Assistants in Internet of Things-equipped environments, establishing a method for assigning users to privacy profiles based on their needs.
eae3b3ed93eb65b01595a5054b022af4c6e67b78.found: We found that while users with high privacy motivations preferred notification and recommendation types of Personal Privacy Assistants, they leaned towards fully autonomous systems when faced with a high volume of privacy decisions, indicating a trade-off between control and convenience.
eae3b3ed93eb65b01595a5054b022af4c6e67b78.takeaway: Our findings suggest that designing scalable Personal Privacy Assistants should prioritize user control in low-decision environments while allowing for automation in situations with frequent decisions to enhance usability.

ee936956d86e6aa468f7767ca5550f924820165b.did: We built VRSketchPen, a pen that uses pneumatic and vibrotactile feedback to enhance sketching accuracy in virtual three-dimensional environments without constraining user actions.
ee936956d86e6aa468f7767ca5550f924820165b.found: We found that VRSketchPen significantly improves 2D shape accuracy and reduces depth errors when sketching on both flat and curved surfaces compared to traditional snapping methods.
ee936956d86e6aa468f7767ca5550f924820165b.takeaway: Our work demonstrates that incorporating unconstrained haptic feedback into virtual sketching tools can enhance user convenience, confidence, and overall experience, making it a valuable asset for designers and artists.

f099a046ac3fccade5b3c118f8a96a740631b000.did: We built TactileGlove, a smart glove with vibrotactile actuators that provides spatial guidance in three-dimensional space.
f099a046ac3fccade5b3c118f8a96a740631b000.found: We found that the Pull metaphor for vibrotactile navigation instructions is preferred, leading to faster target identification and fewer errors compared to the Push metaphor.
f099a046ac3fccade5b3c118f8a96a740631b000.takeaway: The use of more actuators significantly improves performance in task completion time, highlighting the potential of vibrotactile feedback for assistive navigation technologies.

f0f3f08a67da607d209af89c8fde7b4a495a04bf.did: We conducted a systematic evaluation of the ergonomics of rotational mid-air interactions in Augmented Reality environments through a controlled experiment with 19 participants.
f0f3f08a67da607d209af89c8fde7b4a495a04bf.found: We found that close-to-body interactions significantly improve user comfort and accuracy, particularly in seated positions, while rotations around the upper axis reduce the number of required interactions.
f0f3f08a67da607d209af89c8fde7b4a495a04bf.takeaway: Our findings highlight the importance of ergonomic considerations in the design of Augmented Reality interfaces to enhance user experience and minimize discomfort.

f62211147ae29ab194d6e7daf264352439204475.did: We conducted a study on the design of private conversation methods in Social Virtual Reality applications, focusing on user needs and interaction methods.
f62211147ae29ab194d6e7daf264352439204475.found: We found that users prioritize privacy, ease of use, and awareness of surroundings when engaging in private conversations, revealing significant limitations in existing methods like Private Talk and Private Room.
f62211147ae29ab194d6e7daf264352439204475.takeaway: Our work contributes a comprehensive design space that can guide the development of more intuitive and meaningful private conversation experiences in Social Virtual Reality, ultimately fostering self-disclosure and enhancing user safety.

f6c96e1f0c630002666b1509e69ca11a3181a182.did: We built Trilaterate, a fabrication pipeline to 3D print custom objects that detect the 3D position of a finger hovering, touching, or pressing on them using capacitive trilateration.
f6c96e1f0c630002666b1509e69ca11a3181a182.found: We found that our approach enables reliable detection of force, touch, and hover interactions with customizable sensing surfaces, achieving low error rates in positional accuracy and force sensing.
f6c96e1f0c630002666b1509e69ca11a3181a182.takeaway: Our work contributes to the creation of interactive objects through accessible fabrication, pushing the boundaries of Human-Computer Interaction by integrating advanced sensing capabilities directly into 3D-printed structures.

f6f0de450ca2ebd318ad9fb7f17320e05685b32b.did: We conducted a study to evaluate three notification selection techniques—Dwell Time, Gestures, and MAGIC Pointing—specifically for cyclists using Augmented Reality in a simulated biking scenario.
f6f0de450ca2ebd318ad9fb7f17320e05685b32b.found: We found that MAGIC Pointing resulted in significantly faster response times compared to both Dwell Time and Gestures, while Dwell Time yielded the lowest error rate among the three techniques.
f6f0de450ca2ebd318ad9fb7f17320e05685b32b.takeaway: Our findings indicate that MAGIC Pointing is the most effective interaction method for cyclists in Augmented Reality, highlighting the importance of developing intuitive and non-disruptive interaction modalities to improve safety and efficiency while cycling.

f84186ca766c0342d6548a7ac04192a686321734.did: We built an integrated hybrid tabletop system called StackTop that enables true hybrid stacking of digital and physical documents.
f84186ca766c0342d6548a7ac04192a686321734.found: We found that users easily adopted their natural stacking practices in this hybrid environment, demonstrating positive engagement with the concept of hybrid stacking.
f84186ca766c0342d6548a7ac04192a686321734.takeaway: Our research offers valuable insights for designing future hybrid tabletop systems, emphasizing the need for intuitive interactions and user-driven functionalities that align with user expectations of physical document handling.

f896d23dd07adbe02afe28119dbe2f6fcebccc0e.did: We built a method to embed liquids into 3D printed objects to sense various tilting and motion interactions using capacitive sensing.
f896d23dd07adbe02afe28119dbe2f6fcebccc0e.found: We found that tap water serves as the most suitable liquid for achieving accurate and linear capacity measurements in our designs.
f896d23dd07adbe02afe28119dbe2f6fcebccc0e.takeaway: Our approach offers a low-cost and efficient way to enhance the interactivity of 3D printed objects without the need for complex assembly after printing.

f9d1b709872c6f65dff263d9797f1736ab024f2e.did: We built a prototype of a simple non-humanoid robot that tracks and synchronizes with the upper body movements of humans to explore the impact of synchronization on trust.
f9d1b709872c6f65dff263d9797f1736ab024f2e.found: We found that synchronized movements significantly increased participants' trust ratings toward the robot compared to random and simple movement patterns.
f9d1b709872c6f65dff263d9797f1736ab024f2e.takeaway: Our research demonstrates that synchronization can be an effective strategy for enhancing trust in non-humanoid robots, offering insights for designers of future human-robot interfaces.

fdfd33de7bc0c83f1e6a4c947540d537f28c84b2.did: We conducted a study to explore how augmented reality visual filters and synchronized audio cues influence taste perception in Extended Reality environments.
fdfd33de7bc0c83f1e6a4c947540d537f28c84b2.found: We found that while a pink visual filter reduced perceived bitterness alone, it unexpectedly increased bitterness perception when combined with sweet-associated audio cues, highlighting complex crossmodal interactions.
fdfd33de7bc0c83f1e6a4c947540d537f28c84b2.takeaway: Our findings suggest that incorporating user confidence levels in sensory evaluations can enhance the design of multisensory experiences, revealing new dimensions in user engagement and perceptual reliability.

ff6644f703d59573756b6fcd2c128b3c58578e56.did: We built FreeTop, an approach that automatically identifies suitable areas for projection and touch interaction using depth and color information.
ff6644f703d59573756b6fcd2c128b3c58578e56.found: We found that FreeTop generates a continuous projectability score for each pixel, allowing for flexible and adaptive placement of projected content based on various environmental factors.
ff6644f703d59573756b6fcd2c128b3c58578e56.takeaway: Our work significantly enhances the usability of projection technologies in dynamic environments by providing a system that adjusts to surface conditions and user preferences.
